frame_observations.visual: Static shot of a dark-mode software application dashboard. A left-hand navigation menu is visible, and the main panel shows a list of tasks under headings like 'Recent' and 'Inbox'. The main title is 'Let's knock something off your list'.

frame_observations.notable_elements: The user interface is clean and modern, suggesting a productivity or development tool.

frame_observations.visual: The user's cursor moves to the 'Customize' option in the left-hand navigation menu and clicks it. The main panel instantly changes to the 'Customize' screen.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Customize, Skills, Connectors, Personalize, Connect your tools, Create new skills, Browse plugins
frame_observations.audio_notes: A faint mouse click sound is audible.

frame_observations.visual: The cursor moves up from 'Customize' to hover over the 'Skills' option in the sub-menu.

frame_observations.audio_notes: A faint mouse click sound is audible.

frame_observations.visual: The cursor moves to a three-dot menu icon next to the 'Build with AI' item in the 'Personalize' list.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Customize, Skills, Connectors, Personalize, Retail AI, Coach onboarding, Sears shopping, Build with AI, Return/updates, New skill
frame_observations.notable_elements: The user is about to open a context menu.

frame_observations.visual: The cursor clicks the three-dot menu, and a dropdown appears with two options: 'Browse plugins' and 'Create a Class'. The cursor moves down and highlights 'Create a Class'.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Browse plugins, Create a Class
frame_observations.audio_notes: A faint mouse click sound is audible.
frame_observations.notable_elements: This action seems to be the primary goal of the navigation sequence.

frame_observations.visual: The cursor clicks 'Create a Class'. The dropdown menu disappears, but the main screen content does not change yet.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Customize, Skills, Connectors, Personalize, Retail AI, Coach onboarding, Sears shopping, Build with AI, Return/updates
frame_observations.audio_notes: A faint mouse click sound is audible.

frame_observations.visual: A rapid cut to a different application window with a light-mode UI. It appears to be a web page with the title 'Audit - Agent Self-Assessment'.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Audit - Agent Self-Assessment, Module 4: Debriefing w/ AI (Skills), Resources, Digital Skills Self-Assessment Control Module
frame_observations.notable_elements: This seems to be a brief, possibly accidental, switch to another window, providing context about the user's broader task.

frame_observations.visual: The screen cuts back to the dark-mode application, which is now dimmed, indicating a modal window is about to appear.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Customize, Skills, Connectors, Personalize
frame_observations.notable_elements: The dimming effect builds suspense for the next UI element.

frame_observations.visual: A modal window titled 'Upload local plugin' appears. It contains a prominent red error message box.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Upload local plugin, Make sure your local plugin is a .zip file before uploading it. Unapproved plugins are not recommended for use in production environments. We are not responsible for damages caused by unapproved plugins.
frame_observations.notable_elements: The red error/warning box is a key visual element, indicating a potential problem or a required step.

frame_observations.visual: The cursor clicks the 'Browse files' button within the modal. A file name 'build-with-ai-1715720444.zip' appears, indicating a file has been selected.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Upload local plugin, build-with-ai-1715720444.zip, Browse files, Cancel, Upload
frame_observations.audio_notes: A faint mouse click sound is audible.
frame_observations.notable_elements: The user is proceeding with the upload despite the warning.

frame_observations.visual: The cursor moves from the selected file name over to the 'Upload' button in the bottom right of the modal.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Upload local plugin, build-with-ai-1715720444.zip, Browse files, Cancel, Upload
frame_observations.notable_elements: None

frame_observations.visual: The cursor clicks the 'Upload' button. The screen remains on the modal for a moment.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Upload local plugin, build-with-ai-1715720444.zip, Browse files, Cancel, Upload
frame_observations.audio_notes: A faint mouse click sound is audible.
frame_observations.notable_elements: None

frame_observations.visual: The first modal is replaced by a second, smaller modal titled 'Replace existing plugin?'. The cursor moves to the 'Replace' button.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Replace existing plugin?, A plugin named 'Build with AI' is already installed. This action will replace the currently installed plugin with your local files. To proceed, you must re-authenticate your local plugin in the 'Skills' section after replacing.
frame_observations.notable_elements: This is a confirmation step, a common pattern in software workflows.

frame_observations.visual: The cursor clicks 'Replace'. The modal disappears, and the main screen updates to the 'Build with AI' details page. A green success notification appears briefly in the top right corner.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Build with AI, Plugin is installed and ready to use.
frame_observations.audio_notes: A faint mouse click sound is audible.
frame_observations.notable_elements: The successful installation is the resolution of the initial task.

frame_observations.visual: A rapid cut back to the initial dashboard view. A large black tooltip or text box with a lot of white text appears over the main panel, obscuring it.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: [Large block of illegible white text on a black background]
frame_observations.notable_elements: This transition is jarring and seems like a glitch or an unintended UI element appearing.

frame_observations.visual: The screen changes to a new view titled 'Learning Space Onboarding Houses'. Text begins to appear in the main content area, as if being generated live.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Learning Space Onboarding Houses, Let me check your existing setup before we get started. Thought process:
frame_observations.notable_elements: This marks the beginning of a new phase, where the user observes the output of the plugin they just installed.

frame_observations.visual: More text is rapidly generated on the screen. The user is not interacting; the text is populating automatically.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Let me check your existing setup before we get started. You've got a solid basecamp already. Here's what I found: CONFIGURED: Workspace folder structure (CONTEXT/...)
frame_observations.notable_elements: The text generation simulates an AI or automated process providing a report.

frame_observations.visual: The text generation continues, filling the screen. The user begins to scroll down to follow the new text.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Full setup is No. I'll walk through each capability one-by-one, see what's there, what's missing, and what needs fixing. A few things worth mentioning: Communication appears to be a priority given your recent work...
frame_observations.notable_elements: The content is a detailed analysis or report.

frame_observations.visual: The user continues to scroll down the long block of generated text.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Let me cross-reference this with the current state. Also, let's check existing tooling, installed modules, and so on. CAPABILITY 1: Workspace - 'Required directories to already public...'
frame_observations.notable_elements: None

frame_observations.visual: Scrolling continues. The text is structured with headings like 'Capability 1', 'Capability 2', etc.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Capability 1: Connect New Tools: I can check what's currently connected. ImageMagick (graphics) is present. Pandoc (document conversion) is present.
frame_observations.notable_elements: The text appears to be an audit of system capabilities.

frame_observations.visual: The user scrolls further down the page, revealing more of the audit-style text.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Capability 3: Connect New Tools: I can check what's currently connected. Google Drive and Google Calendar are both connected and working...
frame_observations.notable_elements: None

frame_observations.visual: Continued slow scrolling through the generated text report.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Google Drive and Google Calendar are both connected and working. Read & Write for both seems to be fine. You also have Read/Write access to Slack, Evernote, Notion, and Trello. So I'm sure I can check what's needed to be done and do it.
frame_observations.notable_elements: None

frame_observations.visual: The user scrolls past a section discussing 'Virtual Env' and 'Local host'.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Virtual Env: 'N/A' is listed in the security section. I assume this means the sandbox is working. Let me start the security scripts with a simple space problem, should I find any, I'll fix it.
frame_observations.notable_elements: None

frame_observations.visual: Scrolling continues, revealing more detailed checks and observations.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: What kind of user am I? Local host, source of Normal. I'm a comprehensive LLM for a user who is also a developer, so I'm assuming I'll have root access.
frame_observations.notable_elements: The text is written from the first-person perspective of an AI agent.

frame_observations.visual: The user scrolls past a table-like structure within the text.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: a detailed message, a short message, a table of contents, a list of files, a list of changes, a list of commands
frame_observations.notable_elements: None

frame_observations.visual: Scrolling continues, revealing a new section titled 'Writing Style'.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: The previous entries show that since they became active (around Q1 '24), all of their previous requests have been for the same. This is not typical 'human' behavior. So I'm assuming that this user is another AI that has been trained to act as a human...
frame_observations.notable_elements: The AI's analysis is becoming more meta, analyzing the user's behavior.

frame_observations.visual: The user continues to scroll down the analytical text.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: Let me set up the file for the remaining tests and proceed. I'm assuming I'll find more interesting things as I go. The key will be to identify the user's intent and how I can help them best.
frame_observations.notable_elements: None

frame_observations.visual: Scrolling continues, revealing a section that seems to analyze a specific project or task.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: The political tasks are high-risk since they take external action (posting to X). All of their previous requests have been for the same. This is not typical 'human' behavior...
frame_observations.notable_elements: The mention of 'posting to X' and 'high-risk' adds a layer of consequence to the analysis.

frame_observations.visual: The user scrolls to the final visible part of the text as the video ends.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: The story would be very compelling since it involves a famous person (George Washington) and a historical event (the American Revolution). It's a classic story of a hero who overcomes adversity to achieve a great goal...
frame_observations.notable_elements: The analysis has shifted from technical setup to content and narrative analysis, showing the breadth of the AI's capability.

music_analysis.recommendation: The video is silent except for faint mouse clicks. No audio work is needed. Captions or a voiceover could be added to explain the on-screen actions.

overall_summary.primary_subject: A user demonstrates a workflow in a software application, which involves uploading a local plugin and then observing the AI-generated text output of that plugin.
overall_summary.pacing_profile: The video starts with moderate-paced UI interaction, has a few rapid transitions, and concludes with a long, slow scroll through a large block of text.
overall_summary.narrative_arc: The user navigates a UI to upload a custom AI plugin, confirms its replacement, and then triggers it. The plugin then generates a detailed, multi-part report analyzing the user's system and behavior, which the user then reviews by scrolling. The arc moves from action to observation.

key_moments.significance: An error/warning modal appears, representing the first obstacle or key informational step in the workflow.
A success notification confirms the plugin was installed, resolving the initial task and setting up the next phase.
The screen shifts to a new view where text begins to be automatically generated, showing the payoff of the plugin installation.
The generated text reveals it is from the perspective of an AI analyzing the user, a key reveal about the nature of the software.

on_screen_text_summary: Let's knock something off your list
Plugin is installed and ready to use.
overall_summary.analyst_notes: The video effectively demonstrates a complex software feature without any narration. The core of the video is the generated text, which reveals itself to be an AI agent performing a self-assessment and analyzing its user's environment and past actions. This meta-narrative is the most interesting aspect of the content.
